qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the Globus launcher icon within JupyterLab?
qa_pairs.answer: If Globus is available on the cluster you are using, this icon will open your browser to the corresponding Globus collection.

qa_pairs.question: What information does the Metrix launcher icon provide in JupyterLab?
qa_pairs.answer: If the Metrix job portal is available on the cluster you are using, this icon will open a page with the statistics of your job.

qa_pairs.question: How do users perform copy and paste operations in the JupyterLab terminal, and what is important to remember about using Ctrl+C?
qa_pairs.answer: To copy text, select the text, then press Ctrl+C. To avoid sending a SIGINT signal instead of copying, click on the terminal to deselect any text before pressing Ctrl+C. To paste text, press Ctrl+V.
